text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 24 

SECONDARY_TAXONOMY_CODE 

LABEL: Pharmacy Secondary Taxonomy Code 

DESCRIPTION: This is the secondary taxonomy code for the pharmacy, if applicable. This field allows researchers to 
better understand the type of pharmacy that dispensed the medication. Pharmacies are not required 
by NCPDP to specify a secondary dispenser type. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: SECONDARY_TAXONOMY_CODE 

TYPE:
